---
title: "Dissolved Oxygen and Aquatic Invertebrate Abundance at North Campus Open Space"
author: "Stella Freedberg, Kimberly Wong, Sami Gibson"
date: today
format: 
  pdf:
    toc: true 
    number-sections: true 
bibliography: references.bib 
execute: 
  echo: false 
  warning: false 
  message: false 
  results: hide ---
---
